reviews.title: Easy to use website and super quick to…
reviews.body: Easy to use website and super quick to open an account. Liked to way the site flagged up accounts with better interest than my current one. Would be good to be alerted to this beforehand by mail shots to retain loyal customers especially.

reviews.title: Speedy work from Anthony
reviews.body: Speedy work from Anthony! Thank you!

reviews.title: Good building society
reviews.body: Good building society, staff very helpful. It makes all the difference talking to a person and no a robot. And they still use pass books, very happy.

reviews.title: Everyone in the branch are very helpful…
reviews.body: Everyone in the branch are very helpful and pleasant.  The person who dealt with everything we needed did so very efficiently.  We have no complaints and are happy that our finances are being dealt with properly.

reviews.title: They did good 👍
reviews.body: They did good 👍

reviews.title: Friendly greeting
reviews.body: Friendly greeting. Extremely helpful with my business. Caring for my disability. Lovely bright, spacious environment.Easy access for mobility scooter.

reviews.title: Open a new account and transfer old account
reviews.body: We were able to speak with an actual person and not a machine.We felt welcomed and important. The staff at this branch are great. They gave all the time we needed to make our decisions and were interested in us as people. Sarah particularly talked us through the process and was very patient without being patronising.

reviews.title: Fast and efficient service
reviews.body: It was a fast and efficient service. The clerk gave me good advice and answered all of my questions. Excellent customer service

reviews.title: Delay in processing deposit
reviews.body: 'Technical issue' meant that my investment was made on a Monday but did not show up in my account until Wednesday. This was very worrying.

reviews.title: SARA was very helpful and explained…
reviews.body: SARA was very helpful and explained everything clearly.

reviews.title: Friendly and professional
reviews.body: Friendly and professional

reviews.title: We have always had great advice from…
reviews.body: We have always had great advice from your representatives. They are always patient and explain everything simply

reviews.title: Really pleasant staff who sorted us out…
reviews.body: Really pleasant staff who sorted us out with new accounts promptly and efficiently.

reviews.title: Excellent service
reviews.body: Excellent service at Dereham branch. Opened a new savings account. Was seen immediately and account details explained throughly. Good to have somewhere local that can go in and see some very friendly and knowledgeable staff. Would highly recommend to my family and friends

reviews.title: Appointment spot on time
reviews.body: Appointment spot on time, lovely lady sorted a cash ISA for me explained everything and made sure I was aware of everything.Lovely experience from my initial phone call to  to going into the shop

reviews.title: The staff are always really friendly…
reviews.body: The staff are always really friendly and helpful.

reviews.title: Got everything sorted that I wanted
reviews.body: Got everything sorted that I wanted. Friendly and knowledgeable staff. Even though they had to explain things several times, very patient.

reviews.title: Face to face service
reviews.body: Staff friendly and efficient as they always are. I want to continue to receive service from a fellow human and not a machine and this I get using the Nottingham Building Society. Much appreciated.

reviews.title: Very friendly and helpful counter…
reviews.body: Very friendly and helpful counter staff.Explained everything and advised on the new product

reviews.title: Move to online accounts not welcome
reviews.body: I really like using the local branch - the staff are very friendly and helpful. So I am disappointed that more accounts and the better rates are only available online

reviews.title: Fantastic service in Newark branch
reviews.body: Great transaction - the girl who served me gave me sound advice and showed genuine interest in me as a person.

reviews.title: Really good service
reviews.body: Staff helpful and account set up efficiently

reviews.title: Perfect helpful phone call
reviews.body: It's so good to speak to a local representative. The conversation was clear, respectful and positive in every way.

reviews.title: We were welcomed as we arrived
reviews.body: We were welcomed as we arrived, nice friendly and informative staff, we were offered a warm drink which was lovely.

reviews.title: My husband and I recently visited…
reviews.body: My husband and I recently visited Mansfield Branch to open 2 accounts.  The member of staff was friendly and efficient and made the whole process quick and easy.  The staff in this branch always provide the same good service

reviews.title: Now even better / refurbished branch!
reviews.body: Now even better: the same super friendly team delivering consistently exemplary customer care in a 100% refurbished branch!

reviews.title: Always polite and helpful at the Belper…
reviews.body: Always polite and helpful at the Belper Branch a pleasure to do business, thank you.

reviews.title: Generally excellent
reviews.body: Generally excellent, but they dropped a brick when completing the transfer in of an ISA. When I realised that the transaction had not happened, they responded well in correcting the  error, and compensated me.

reviews.title: Branch accounts
reviews.body: Able to go into branch and open an account easily and quickly.  Very pleasant and helpful staff.

reviews.title: Great customer service
reviews.body: Time was a bit tight with releasing my LISA funds coming close to completion. I phoned up the Nottingham and got great support from Anthony Huckstep. He checked over the details on the forms and made sure the process was set in motion straight away. I really appreciated his efforts to help me. Really good customer care! In general, I have found this LISA product easy to use and would recommend it to others.

reviews.title: Outstanding Building Society with such helpful staff.
reviews.body: My local Nottingham branch is manages and staffed by such lovely professionals. I find their approach to my individualcircumstances outstanding. They are always willing to help.

reviews.title: excellent counter staff-very friendly
reviews.body: excellent counter staff-very friendlycan't put date in as its set up incorrectly!

reviews.title: Very secure
reviews.body: Very secure

reviews.title: Effective helpful and polite call handling
reviews.body: The person who handled my call yesterday was very effective, helpful and polite.  Very impressed with Nottingham Building Society

reviews.title: Exceptionally Helpful, Friendly, and Efficient Service Every Time
reviews.body: I recently visited my local Nottingham Building Society with a query, and once again the service was outstanding. The staff are always incredibly helpful and so chatty, which instantly makes me feel comfortable and welcome. Although I didn’t catch any names, the person helping me didn’t know the answer straight away but quickly checked with a colleague, and I was in and out within 10 minutes.I’ve been with the Nottingham for as long as I can remember and have never experienced anything less than excellent service. Truly a 10/10 experience every time. Highly recommend to anyone!

reviews.title: I wanted to transfer a maturing ISA…
reviews.body: I wanted to transfer a maturing ISA from Coventry Building Society to Nottingham Building Society. I called in expecting to have to make an appointment but was seen straightaway, was dealt with professionally, courteously and friendly. A few days later I received an email to say the money had been transferred and to call in to have my book updated. Everything went very smoothly and satisfactorily.

reviews.title: Fantastic, knowledgeable and friendly staff.
reviews.body: Fantastic, knowledgeable, professional and friendly staff.  Long may face to face contact continue.

reviews.title: Excellent customer service
reviews.body: Excellent customer service. Professional, friendly, attentive to details, patient, courteous ... all  qualities necessary for excellence.

reviews.title: Face to face meeting.
reviews.body: I'm hard of hearing and have difficulty listening to a telephone conversation so I prefer a face to face meeting. I decided to call into my local branch. No appointment was needed yet it turned out to be quite a complicated issue. All sorted out to my satisfaction.Also I wanted to withdraw a fairly large sum of money but not in cash. The assistant wrote me a cheque. Simple! I couldn't have done it over the phone.

reviews.title: Praise for Nottingham building society!
reviews.body: I like to call into a branch and see and talk to a human being, Belper is my local town, the staff there are very helpful and friendly, Nottingham building society is carrying on with passbooks, I can see my account without having to go online, perfect!!

reviews.title: Very easy to   do  and staff very…
reviews.body: Very easy to   do  and staff very welcoming and helpful

reviews.title: Very efficient and sorted new accounts…
reviews.body: Very efficient and sorted new accounts out very quickly for me.

reviews.title: good smiles and more.
reviews.body: good service, smiles and always polite and helpful.

reviews.title: Very easy to set up my new account
reviews.body: Very easy to set up my new account, and first class treatment from all the staff.Would highly recommend to anyone considering  a Building  Society saving scheme.

reviews.title: Very friendly and efficient staff
reviews.body: Very friendly and efficient staff. Made very welcome in branch.

reviews.title: Very pleasant and friendly
reviews.body: Very pleasant and friendly

reviews.title: Always great personal service at St Albans .
reviews.body: I visited the branch to takeout a new ISA.Kelly sorted it out for me then telephoned later to say the money had not been received from my bank.She said she was off the next day and a colleague would deal with it.Just as promised Maddy phoned to say the money had been received .Thank you to both.

reviews.title: Very friendly service very…
reviews.body: Very friendly service very knowledgeable person who I saw went in detail about what I was looking for would recommend

reviews.title: Staff are always friendly and…
reviews.body: Staff are always friendly and knowledgeable about the  investment selections available

reviews.body: Visited the Worksop branch 17th Nov. The staff took time to understand my needs and advise on best products

reviews.body: One of the few financial institutes that will talk to me face to face thus allowing me to obtain all the information I require.

reviews.title: V helpful friendly  staff.
reviews.body: V helpful friendly  staff.Business concluded promptlyI do prefe having ga passbook rather than an online account

reviews.title: We have a Newark Branch - long may it continue.
reviews.body: Called into our local Newark Branch. Having a Branch to call into is something in its self. Approachable, helpful staff. No waiting, processed my transactions quickly and professionally and gave helpful advice.

reviews.title: Friendly and helpful staff
reviews.body: Friendly and helpful staff. Well organised, knowledgeable, patient and easy to talk to.  So much better than having to do it on-line or via a remote call centre.

reviews.title: Hayley at the Sutton in Ashfield was…
reviews.body: Hayley at the Sutton in Ashfield was excellent helping through what was best for us.

reviews.body: Every easy to open a new account with eveeything clearly explained

reviews.title: So far haven’t managed to open an…
reviews.body: So far haven’t managed to open an account. Brassed of.

reviews.title: A Great Building Society
reviews.body: Easy to set up, Nottingham BS reputation, great products and interst rates.

reviews.title: I visited to find out what the balance…
reviews.body: I visited the Beeston branch to find out what the balance was on my account but I did not have my passbook with me. The lady cashier I spoke to asked me some security questions and vey kindly printed off a mini statement for me showing the latest balance and recent transactions. I also enquired about other accounts available and after giving me a lot of written and verbal information and advice, the cashier helped me open a new account ideally suited to my needs. Unfortunately I cannot remember the cashier’s name but I am most pleased with the service I received. There was no pressure at all and the cashier was helpful, friendly and professional throughout.

reviews.title: local and open you are loc
reviews.body: Because you are local and open

reviews.title: Excellent Service
reviews.body: Opened a LISA a number of years ago and used it purchase a house- really good response time when the request went in and dealt with minor paperwork issues within hours. Fully intend to keep the account open for retirement savings!
